1985March 19, 1985

🇫🇷 Paris, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Paris, France, March 19, 1985 -- March 29, 1985

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1985-03-paris-france

6 Resolutions

11Plenary
Direct WG 1 to develop documentation and functional requirements for STEP
SC 4 directs WG 1 to: * Develop documentation requirements for future work * Develop a specific list of documents needed for a first version of STEP * Develop precise functional requirements for Ve...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
10Plenary
Align national standards development with STEP to ensure convergence
SC 4 agrees that, whenever existing national standards are enhanced, development should be undertaken in parallel with the corresponding STEP effort, using the same reference model to ensure that c...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
9Plenary
Reconfirm the STEP goal and target first version for 1990 industrial use
SC 4 reconfirms its goal as expressed in Resolution #2: to develop as soon as possible a single international standard for the exchange of product definition data to be called the standard for the ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
8Plenary
Adopt the agenda for the March 1985 Paris meeting
SC 4 adopts the agenda SC 4 N 13 for the March 85 meeting as amended by SC 4 N 15.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
7Plenary
Constitute drafting committee with French and English language representatives
SC 4 constitutes the drafting committee to include: * B. LUCET for the French language * I. BODNAR for the English language
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 recognizes the excellent work of Mesdames LEBADEZET and CHAUMONT, and thanks AFNOR for its hospitality in hosting this session.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
